title: In-App Help FAB Migration
summary: Documenting the transition of in-app help to a floating action button design pattern.
hypothesis: By moving in-app help to a floating action button, we expect to increase help feature discoverability and usage because the FAB pattern is more visible and accessible throughout the user journey.
notes: Uncertainty about current implementation status - needs verification of what's currently live in production.
control_description: Current in-app help interface (specific design unclear)
treatment_description: Floating action button (FAB) pattern for in-app help access
